title.en: The Sect Master of the Heavenly Restoration Sec...

content.en:
"Haihe, then you can go. "

The Sect Master of the Heavenly Restoration Sect agreed.

The Haihe Controller is a Seven Realm-level Controller, one of the Deputy Sect Masters of the Futian Sect, and his strength is very powerful.

And Ye Tian was only a Six Realms-level controller, so he was naturally far from being the opponent of Haihe's controller.

With the strength of the Haihe master, Ye Tian could be killed within a few moves, thus erasing the traces of time and space and easily escaping.

At that time, even if the Ten Elements Ancestor came, he might not be able to find any traces.

Of course, there are still some dangers in this operation, but the benefits are also enormous.

If he succeeded in devouring Ye Tian, the Haihe master would have more control over the changes in various Daos, and if Ye Tian had any amazing treasures on his body, it would also belong to him.

At this moment.

The Futian Sect still didn't know about Ye Tian's possession of two true bodies, because Ye Tian's true body in the Void Region had been in retreat, so no one knew that there was still a true body of Ye Tian in the Void Region.

Otherwise, they wouldn't dare to attack Ye Tian casually, after all, killing Ye Tian's true body would not kill Ye Tian.

......

Tongyang Mountain.

Ye Tian was cultivating here again, he knew very well that he had killed the Luo Yu master, and the Futian Sect must have known about the situation, and the others must have hidden.

Therefore, it will be difficult for him to find those eternal masters for a long time to come.

If he really couldn't find it, he would consider whether to reveal the list of those members of the Restoration Heaven Sect.

Of course, he calculated that the Futian Sect would not necessarily sit still, and might come to trouble him.

"Futian Sect, if you send someone to kill me, it is best to be an Eight Realm-level controller, otherwise the Seven Realm-level controllers alone will not be able to kill me!"

Ye Tian muttered.

this day.

A figure tore through time and space, and came silently to the outside of Tongyang Mountain.

The eternal controller who came here was the Haihe master, and he was sure that Ye Tian was here.

"Die!"

The Haihe controller has made a move, and as soon as he makes a move, he is the top origin control technique - Galaxy Nine Kills!

Bang!!!

It was as if the nine Origin Milkies were running through from nine directions, shattering Tongyang Mountain in an instant.

After all, Tongyang Mountain was only established by the Tongyang controller, and it was not a good place.

Therefore, those formations on the periphery could not stop the Nine Kills of the Galaxy of the Haihe Masters at all, and they were shattered one after another, annihilating time and space everywhere, turning into nothingness.

In an instant, only the last bit of core remained in Tongyang Mountain, that is, the Tongyang Pagoda.

At the critical moment, Ye Tian reacted, and immediately urged the Wanxiang Statue in his body, showing the strength of the Seven Realms-level controllers, which blocked the Nine Killings of the Galaxy.

"Heavenly Imperial Body!"

The attack of the Galaxy Nine Kills fell on Ye Tian's body and was blocked by the Heavenly Imperial Body.

In an instant, Ye Tian instantly cast the Nine Flashes of Thunder Body, and then cast the Space-Time Splitting Blade.

The Origin Control Technique of the Space-Time Rifting Blade turned into a Splitting Blade, which was held in Ye Tian's hand, and slashed towards the Haihe Controller.

And the Haihe Controller also used a defensive origin control technique in time to block the Space-Time Rift Blade.

However, the terrifying spatial power contained in the space-time rift still shook off the Haihe master.

The two sides instantly distanced themselves and stood and looked at each other.

"You actually have a strength comparable to that of a Seven Realms-level master!!"

The Haihe Controller was surprised.

He could sense that Ye Tian didn't use the top-notch Origin Control Technique, but his strength was too terrifying.

"External force!"

The Haihe controller saw it, carefully identified the aura that Ye Tian exuded at this time, and immediately confirmed it in his heart.

"You've got a statue of all !!"

The ruler of the sea river is full of jealousy!

The statue of Wanxiang, that is a treasure that even he dreamed of, actually fell into Ye Tian's hands.

If he also obtained the Ten Thousand Phases Statue, even if he couldn't defeat the Eight Realm-level controllers, at least he would be almost invincible among the Seven Realm-level controllers, and he might even have the hope of escaping from the Eight Realm-level controllers.

"Kill him and capture the statue of all phases!"

The Haihe master had such a thought in his heart, and the whole person attacked Ye Tian like a mad demon.

Thundered!!!

Ye Tian and the Haihe Masters continued to fight, and the battle fluctuations between the two sides swept across this area.

At this time.

Tongyang Pagoda Instrument Spirit is very panicked, the huge Tongyang Mountain was instantly attacked by the enemy in a second, if it wasn't for Ye Tian to protect it, it would have to be annihilated!

"The master is so powerful that even the Seven Realms-level controllers can fight with him. However, I had to stay away so as not to be affected. "

Tongyang Pagoda urged Tongyang Pagoda and slowly moved away.

Soon.

The battle here has caught the attention of the Eternal Masters, and they have come over.

And the Haihe master also realized that he was in trouble, and if he continued like this, he was afraid that he would not be able to escape.

"This is the Haihe Master and the Endless Master, how did these two fight?"

"Oh my God, the Haihe controller is a Seven Realms-level controller, and the endless controller is a rising star, so he can actually fight with the Haihe master?"

"No, the breath of the Infinite Controller is still a Six Realms-level Controller, but his strength is comparable to that of a Seven Realm-level Controller, and he uses external forces. "

"It's the statue of Ten Thousand Phases, and the Infinite Controller has fused a statue of Ten Thousand Phases, so that he can fight with the Haihe Controller of the Seven Realms with the strength of the Six Realms-level Controllers. "

"Could it be that the Haihe Master wants to seize the Wanxiang Statue on the Infinite Master, so he will attack the Endless Master?"

"There is this possibility, but the Infinite Master is a personal disciple of the Ten Elements Ancestor, and the Haihe Master doesn't seem to have any background, does he dare to be so bold?"

At this time, some of the Eternal Masters who knew the Infinite Masters also came.

For example, Ye Tian's junior brother, the Six Realms-level controller, and the Light Controller.

"Senior Brother Ye has fought with the Haihe Master?"

The Lightkeeper was a little surprised.

Once upon a time, Ye Tian was still very weak in his eyes, but in the blink of an eye, he was even stronger than him.

"Infinite Master, there is a misunderstanding between us, how about we stop here?"

The Haihe Controller hurriedly said.

He was afraid that Ye Tian's senior brother and sister would come, and it would be troublesome.

"Do you think it's possible, you should be a member of the Futian Sect, if I let you go, then there will be endless troubles. Ye Tian said loudly.

As soon as they heard about the Resurrection Sect, the expressions of many of the Eternal Masters changed.

The Haihe master hurriedly said, "Endless master, don't wronged me!"

"Really?"

Ye Tian sneered.

He wouldn't have wronged the Haihe Masters, except for the Futian Sect, he didn't think that any Seven Realm-level Masters would dare to attack him.

"Senior sister, come out, I have to ask you to help!"

Ye Tian said lightly.

As soon as the words fell, a woman came from tearing through time and space, staring at the Haihe master.

This glance made the Haihe Controller shudder, and his heart was full of despair.

"Snow Maiden Controller!!"
